timeline.title: Employee of the Year 2024 - Quality Team
timeline.subtitle: THIQAH Business Services
timeline.description: Awarded Employee of the Year 2024 within the Quality Team for outstanding technical leadership, AI automation innovation, and elevating team performance through Quality Mate platform and AI-powered initiatives.

timeline.title: Second Place - Elm Company Hackathon
timeline.subtitle: Team Agent X
timeline.description: Achieved Second Place with team Agent X in Elm Company Hackathon. Developed innovative AI-driven solution using Nuha LLM, OpenAI LLM, LangChain, CrewAI, FastAPI, NestJS, and Angular. Received deep admiration from senior judges and executive leaders.

timeline.title: Organizer & Mentor - Thiqah Hackathon
timeline.subtitle: THIQAH Business Services
timeline.description: Led organization of Thiqah Hackathon and mentored cross-functional teams on AI implementation. Ensured high-quality prototypes and effective collaboration while fostering innovation.

timeline.title: Presented iHealth at LEAP 2025
timeline.subtitle: THIQAH Digital Innovation Team
timeline.description: Showcased iHealth product at LEAP 2025 as part of THIQAH's Digital Innovation team, demonstrating innovative healthcare solution born from collaboration and innovation.

timeline.title: Launched Quality Mate Platform
timeline.subtitle: AI-Powered Testing Assistant
timeline.description: Designed and developed Quality Mate, an AI-powered testing assistant with centralized test management, intelligent test generation, execution tracking, and seamless Azure DevOps/Jira integration. Transformed team efficiency and quality metrics.

timeline.title: Launched Test League & QC Tube
timeline.subtitle: Gamification & Knowledge Hub
timeline.description: Created Test League gamified learning platform and QC Tube knowledge hub for workshops, webinars, and technical sharing. Boosted team collaboration, engagement, and continuous learning culture.

timeline.title: Promoted to Staff Automation & AI Engineer
timeline.subtitle: THIQAH Business Services
timeline.description: Promoted to Staff level position focusing on AI-powered automation, test framework architecture, and technical leadership. Spearheaded AI integration initiatives and mentored engineering teams on automation best practices.

timeline.title: Completed Full Stack AI Course
timeline.subtitle: Advanced AI/ML Training
timeline.description: Completed comprehensive Full Stack AI Course covering AI/ML fundamentals, implementation strategies, and practical applications in software testing and automation.

timeline.title: Promoted to Lead QA Automation Engineer
timeline.subtitle: THIQAH Business Services
timeline.description: Led QA automation initiatives including Robot Framework adoption, CI/CD pipeline design, and team mentorship. Established automation best practices and frameworks across multiple enterprise projects.

timeline.title: Promoted to Senior QA Automation Engineer
timeline.subtitle: THIQAH Business Services
timeline.description: Advanced to senior role with focus on automation framework development, test strategy design, and team leadership. Delivered high-impact solutions for government and enterprise platforms.

timeline.title: ISTQB Foundation Level Certification
timeline.subtitle: International Software Testing Qualifications Board
timeline.description: Achieved ISTQB Foundation Level certification, demonstrating strong understanding of software testing fundamentals, methodologies, and best practices.

timeline.title: Joined THIQAH as QA Automation Engineer
timeline.subtitle: THIQAH Business Services - Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
timeline.description: Started journey with THIQAH, implementing test automation solutions for large-scale government platforms. Built foundation for automation excellence and continuous improvement.

timeline.title: QA Engineer at Algorithmz
timeline.subtitle: Algorithmz - Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
timeline.description: Executed comprehensive testing for trading and investment platforms. Designed test cases, performed functional and regression testing, and collaborated with development teams.

timeline.title: Software Tester at Path Solutions
timeline.subtitle: Path Solutions - Cairo, Egypt
timeline.description: Conducted manual and automated testing for Islamic banking systems. Validated financial transactions, reporting modules, and regulatory compliance features.

timeline.title: Started Career as QA Tester
timeline.subtitle: Silicon Expert - Cairo, Egypt
timeline.description: Began professional QA career performing manual testing for web applications. Developed foundational testing skills including test case design, bug reporting, and quality analysis.

timeline.title: Graduated with Excellent - Final Project
timeline.subtitle: Menoufia University - Electronic Engineering
timeline.description: Graduated from Menoufia University, Faculty of Electronic Engineering, Communication Department. Final project 'GSM Based Home Automation using Arduino' received Excellent grade.
